pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: Look, I get why people say drafting Spain was an obvious move, but when you're Devin—"Ghost Pepper"—and you're trailing by ten points, you can't really pretend there's a master plan. What conversation were you having with yourself when you picked Haiti? Meanwhile, Zach—"Mustard Boy"—is clinging to Austria like it's the savior of his campaign, but let's be realistic; his selection strategy was more like throwing darts at a map. Given Spain's current form and Austria's shaky track record, I predict that Devin's team will squeak out a victory, even if "Ghost Pepper" himself barely knows why. Bless his heart, but at least this will buy Devin some time to think through his next strategic misstep.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Switzerland Poised for Late-Night Clash with Algeria
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach hopes his Tier 2 pick finally pays dividends.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper's Spain Prepares to Outrun Mustard Boy's Austria
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin looks to widen his lead against Zach's draft strategy.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Gains Momentum with England's Narrow Victory
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's questionable draft choices still yielding unexpected results.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's Senegal Stumble Leaves Room at the Top
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner retains his lead despite a lack of upsets.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner's still on top but cruising on a shaky L2 streak. Wake up, Bubba G!
Rafe, the chaos agent, isn't dependent on any Tier-1 team. Wild ride ahead!
Gunner's 6-0 crush on Rafe is a teenage dream-shatterer. Daddy will be proud.
Rafe's chaos blitz resets sim predictions, proving 2% can still rattle cages.
